sqlCommands.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and coalesce(PK,0) = 0
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (PK = 99 or (Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0 and Amt4 = 0))
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0 and Co >= '3000' and Co <= '3999'
update TransX set  Flex4 = 'YE Equity Roll '+PC, PCdesc = 'YE Equity Roll '+PC, Flex6 = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Flex1 = cast(ABS(Amt1) as varchar(255)), Flex2 = cast(ABS(Amt2) as varchar(255)), Flex3 = cast(ABS(Amt3) as varchar(255)), Flex5 = cast(ABS(Amt4) as varchar(255)) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Amt3 = NULL, Amt4 = NULL, Flex3 = '', Flex5 = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2006'

insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, Contract, TTY, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,Amt4, PK) (Select KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, substring(GL,1,5) + '00' as GL, Crcy, TP, PC, Contract, TTY, PTF, -Amt1 as Amt1,-Amt2 as Amt2,  -Amt3 as Amt3,  -Amt4 as Amt4,  '0' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL and ((GL >= '3000000' and GL < '3330000') or GL >= '3640000'))

insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, Contract, TTY, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,Amt4, PK) (Select KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, substring(GL,1,5) + '00' as GL, Crcy, TP, PC, Contract, TTY, PTF, -Amt1 as Amt1,-Amt2 as Amt2,  -Amt3 as Amt3,  -Amt4 as Amt4,  '0' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL and GL >= '3330000' and GL < '3600000' and substring(GL,6,2) in ('01','02'))

insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, Contract, TTY, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,Amt4, PK) (Select KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, '3610000' as GL, Crcy, TP, PC, Contract, TTY, PTF, -Amt1 as Amt1,-Amt2 as Amt2,  -Amt3 as Amt3,  -Amt4 as Amt4,  '0' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL and GL >= '3600000' and GL < '3640000' )

insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, Contract, TTY, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,Amt4, PK) (Select KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, Contract, TTY, PTF, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2,  round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3,  round(sum(Amt4),2) as Amt4,  '99' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, Contract, TTY,PTF)

insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, Contract, TTY, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,Amt4, PK) (Select KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, Contract, TTY, PTF, case when Amt1>0 then Amt1 else 0 end as Amt1, case when Amt2>0 then Amt2 else 0 end as Amt2,  case when Amt3>0 then Amt3 else 0 end as Amt3,  case when Amt4>0 then Amt4 else 0 end as Amt4,  '40' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' )

insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, Contract, TTY, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,Amt4, PK) (Select KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, Contract, TTY, PTF, case when Amt1<0 then Amt1 else 0 end as Amt1, case when Amt2<0 then Amt2 else 0 end as Amt2,  case when Amt3<0 then Amt3 else 0 end as Amt3,  case when Amt4<0 then Amt4 else 0 end as Amt4,  '50' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' )

insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, Contract, TTY, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,Amt4, PK) (Select KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, substring(GL,1,5) + '03' as GL, Crcy, TP, PC, Contract, TTY, PTF, -Amt1 as Amt1,-Amt2 as Amt2,  -Amt3 as Amt3,  -Amt4 as Amt4,  '0' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL and (GL like '11%' or (GL >= '3330000' and GL < '3600000' and substring(GL,6,2) in ('04','05'))))
update TransX set Hierarchy = p.Hierarchy, Region = p.Region, Location = p.Location from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Flex3 = Mapkey from TransX t inner join mapkeyranges m on t.GL >= m.fromGL and t.GL <=m.thruGL where keyID = '[batchID]' and mapkey like 'M1-_-%-%-%' and not mapkey like 'M1-_-%-%-%-%'
update TransX set Flex4 = m.Name from TransX t inner join mapkeys m on t.flex3 = m.mapkey where keyID = '[batchID]'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Contract in ('','UNKNOWN')
delete TransX from TransX t left join CatContracts c on t.Contract + CAST(t.UWYr as nvarchar) = c.Contract + CAST(c.UWYear as nvarchar) where KeyID = '[batchID]' and c.Contract is null
update TransX set BusCat = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'XX'
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set PCdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join PCTRS c on t.PC = c.PCTR where KeyID = '[batchID]'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and amt1 = 0
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex2 = c.Name from TransX t inner join Companies c on t.Co = c.Co where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex1 = '4 FX Hedge' from TransX inner join MapKeyRanges m1 on GL >= FromGL and GL <= ThruGL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m1.MapKey = 'M3-3-6-06-B-2'
update TransX set Flex1 = '3 Other Expense' from TransX inner join MapKeyRanges m1 on GL >= FromGL and GL <= ThruGL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m1.MapKey = 'M3-3-6-06-C'

update TransX set Flex1 = '2 Capital Gains - FX' from TransX inner join MapKeyRanges m1 on GL >= FromGL and GL <= ThruGL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m1.MapKey = 'M3-3-6-06-B' and TTY >= '990' and Flex1 is NULL
update TransX set Flex1 = '1 Investment Income' from TransX inner join MapKeyRanges m1 on GL >= FromGL and GL <= ThruGL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m1.MapKey = 'M3-3-6-06-A' and TTY >= '990'
update TransX set Flex1 = '1 Investment Income' from TransX inner join MapKeyRanges m1 on GL >= FromGL and GL <= ThruGL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m1.MapKey = 'M3-3-6-06-A-1' and Flex1 is NULL
update TransX set Flex1 = '2 Capital Gains - FX' from TransX inner join MapKeyRanges m1 on GL >= FromGL and GL <= ThruGL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m1.MapKey = 'M3-3-6-06-B-1' and Flex1 is NULL
update TransX set Flex1 = '2 Capital Gains - FX' from TransX inner join MapKeyRanges m1 on GL >= FromGL and GL <= ThruGL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m1.MapKey = 'M3-3-6-06-A-2' and Flex1 is NULL
update TransX set Flex1 = '99 not applicable' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 is  NULL
update TransX set Amt4 = NULL, Flex5 = NULL from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '7000'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Amt1 = 0 or Amt2 = 0 or Amt3 = 0 or Amt4 = 0)

delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and ((GL like '%00' and not GL in ('3620000','3630000')) or (GL like '11%' and substring(GL,6,2) in ('01','02','03')) or (GL >= '3330000' and GL < '3600000' and GL like '%03'))
update TransX set Contract = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Contract like '6%'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '11%' and substring(GL,6,1) = '9'
update TransX set TTY = '100' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and coalesce(TTY,'') <> ''
update TransX set Amt1 = -coalesce(Amt1,0), Amt2 = -coalesce(Amt2,0), Amt3 = -coalesce(Amt3,0), Amt4 = -coalesce(Amt4,0) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set TP = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '3610000'
